reforms.description: The Icelandic government has announced a special education and labour market initiative aimed at improving access for individuals re-entering education, particularly targeting up to 1000 long-term unemployed individuals for educational opportunities.
reforms.package_name: Special Education and Labour Market Initiative
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: By enhancing educational access for the long-term unemployed, the initiative aims to improve their employability and integration into the labor market, thus supporting economic growth.
reforms.status_evidence: The government has recently decided on a special education and labour market initiative for the next three years.
reforms.importance_rationale: This initiative represents a significant effort to address educational access for a vulnerable population, which can have lasting impacts on employment and economic participation.
reforms.source_quote: The government has recently decided on a special education and labour market initiative for the next three years to improve access for individuals re-entering education.
